sections.heading: Left hand home row ASDF
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: sad fad dad ask add ash flask lass dash

A glad dad had a flask.
A lass had a sad dad.
Dash had a glad flask.

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Left hand home row ASDF skills.
